# themes Package

Theme engine and built-in themes for runtui.

## Available Themes

| Theme | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `black_white` | Black White color theme |
| `dark` | Dark theme |
| `github` | Github Light theme |
| `gruvbox` | Gruvbox theme |
| `high_contrast` | High Contrast color theme |
| `legacy_system` | Legacy BIOS System theme |
| `light` | Light theme (default) |
| `nord` | Nord color scheme |
| `solarized` | Solarized color scheme |
| `turbo_vision` | Classic Turbo Vision theme |
| `vscode` | Visual Studio Code theme |


## Theme Engine

The `ThemeEngine` class provides color and glyph lookup with fallbacks.
